name: Jamming Tower
rules: Pokémon Tools attached to each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) have no effect.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

name: Levincia
rules: Once during each player's turn, that player may put up to 2 Basic Lightning Energy cards from their discard pile into their hand.
You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

name: Teal Mask Ogerpon ex
rules: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Teal Dance
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach a Basic Grass Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon. If you attached Energy to a Pokémon in this way, draw a card.

attacks.name: Myriad Leaf Shower
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon.

name: Flareon

attacks.name: Destructive Flame
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Blaze
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: Inhaled air is carried to its flame sac, heated, and exhaled as fire that reaches over 3,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Vaporeon

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.text: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fighting Whirlpool
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin, which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Jolteon

attacks.name: Linear Attack
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Fighting Lightning
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex or Pokémon V, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: It concentrates the weak electric charges emitted by its cells and launches wicked lightning bolts.

name: Leafeon

attacks.name: Leaflet Blessings
attacks.text: Attach a Basic Grass Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal all damage from that Pokémon.

flavorText: The younger they are, the more they smell like fresh grass. With age, their fragrance takes on the odor of fallen leaves.

name: Glaceon

attacks.name: Permeating Chill
attacks.text: At the end of your opponent's next turn, put 9 damage counters on the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire.

name: Sylveon

attacks.name: Mystical Return
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. Shuffle that Pokémon and all attached cards into their deck.

attacks.name: Disarming Voice
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Sylveon cuts an elegant figure as it dances lightly around, feelers fluttering, but its piercing moves aim straight for its opponents' weak spots.

name: Eevee

abilities.name: Boosted Evolution
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, it can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element stones.

name: Eevee ex
rules: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Rainbow DNA
abilities.text: This Pokémon can evolve into any Pokémon ex that evolves from Eevee if you play it from your hand onto this Pokémon. (This Pokémon can't evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.)

name: Bloodmoon Ursaluna ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Seasoned Skill
abilities.text: Blood Moon used by this Pokémon costs Colorless less for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Blood Moon
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Kyogre ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Winding Waves
attacks.text: You may switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Tidal Surge
attacks.text: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Xerneas ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Rising Horns
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Dialga ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Time Bellow
attacks.text: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Metal Blast
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: N's Darmanitan

attacks.name: Back Draft
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Basic Energy card in your opponent's discard pile.

attacks.name: Flamebody Cannon
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon, and this attack also does 90 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: This Pokémon's power level rises along with the temperature of its fire, which can reach 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Iono's Kilowattrel

abilities.name: Flashing Draw
abilities.text: You must discard a Basic Lightning Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

flavorText: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

name: Lillie's Ribombee

abilities.name: Inviting Wink
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may have your opponent reveal their hand and you put any number of Basic Pokémon you find there onto their Bench.

flavorText: Ribombee can sense when people or Pokémon are feeling down, and it will cheer them up with handmade pollen puffs.

name: Hop's Snorlax

abilities.name: Extra Helpings
abilities.text: Attacks used by your Hop's Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). The effect of Extra Helpings doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Dynamic Press
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 80 damage to itself.

flavorText: This gluttonous Pokémon eats constantly, apart from when it's asleep. It devours nearly 900 pounds of food per day.

name: Yanma

attacks.name: Silent Wing
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals their hand.

flavorText: It can see in all directions without moving its big eyes, helping it spot both attackers and prey right away.

name: Scraggy

attacks.name: Kick Shot
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: If it locks eyes with you, watch out! Nothing and no one is safe from the reckless headbutts of this troublesome Pokémon.

name: Yanmega

attacks.name: Gyro Shockwave
attacks.text: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Its jaw power is incredible. It is adept at biting apart foes while flying by at high speed.

name: Scrafty

attacks.name: Nab 'n' Dash
attacks.text: Search your deck for a number of cards up to the number of your Benched Pokémon and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: As halfhearted as this Pokémon's kicks may seem, they pack enough power to shatter Conkeldurr's concrete pillars.

name: N's Zorua
flavorText: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

name: Hop's Zacian ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Insta-Strike
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Brave Slash
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Brave Slash.

name: Iono's Bellibolt ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Electric Streamer
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Lightning Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Iono's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderous Bolt
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Lillie's Clefairy ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Fairy Zone
abilities.text: The Weakness of each of your opponent's Dragon Pokémon in play is now Psychic. (Apply Weakness as ×2.)

attacks.name: Full Moon Rondo
attacks.text: This attack does 20 more damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

name: Charizard ex
rules: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks (both yours and your opponent's).
Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Infernal Reign
abilities.text: When you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon during your turn, you may search your deck for up to 3 Basic Fire Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Burning Darkness
attacks.text: This attack does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Koraidon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Revenge Buster
attacks.text: If your Benched Pokémon have any damage counters on them, this attack does 120 more damage.

name: Zacian ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Steel Armament
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Metal Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Slashing Strike
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Slashing Strike.

name: Zarude

attacks.name: Pluck Off
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Grass Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Hammer Whip
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavorText: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It's incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.

name: Eevee

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It can evolve into a variety of forms. Eevee's genes are the key to solving the mysteries of Pokémon evolution.

name: Zebstrika

attacks.name: Full Speed
attacks.text: Discard your hand and draw 6 cards.

flavorText: Once the herd hears thunder, it chases after the storm clouds so that the Blitzle in the group can use the lightning to charge up.

name: Kangaskhan

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Although it's carrying its baby in a pouch on its belly, Kangaskhan is swift on its feet. It intimidates its opponents with quick jabs.

name: Team Rocket's Wobbuffet

attacks.name: Rocket Mirror
attacks.text: Move all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Team Rocket's Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly in the darkness. It is never first to attack.

name: Marnie's Morpeko

attacks.name: Spiky Wheel
attacks.text: This attack does 40 more damage for each Darkness Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Morpeko eats seeds constantly to keep its hunger at bay. If it's hungry for too long, it grows wild and brutish.

name: Steven's Beldum
flavorText: The magnetic force generated by its body repels the ground's natural magnetism, letting it float.

name: Sewaddle
flavorText: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.

name: Swadloon

abilities.name: Healing Leaves
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

name: Leavanny

attacks.name: Healing Wrapping
attacks.text: Heal 100 damage from each of your Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.

name: Cottonee

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.text: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.

name: Whimsicott ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Energy Gift
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Wondrous Cotton
attacks.text: Your opponent reveals their hand. This attack does 50 damage for each Trainer card you find there.

name: Deerling
flavorText: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.

name: Sawsbuck

attacks.name: Push Down
attacks.text: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck's horns.

name: Shelmet

abilities.name: Stimulated Evolution
abilities.text: If you have Karrablast in play, this Pokémon can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.

flavorText: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.

name: Accelgor

attacks.name: Acid Spray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

name: Virizion

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.text: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Emerald Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

name: Tepig
flavorText: It can deftly dodge its foe's attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.

name: Pignite
flavorText: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

name: Emboar

abilities.name: Inferno Fandango
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Fire Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

name: Pansear

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.

name: Simisear
flavorText: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.

name: Litwick

attacks.name: Brighten and Burn
attacks.text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may discard that card.

flavorText: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

name: Lampent

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.

name: Chandelure

attacks.name: Incendiary Pillar
attacks.text: If you have 10 or more Basic Fire Energy cards in your discard pile, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Burn It All Up
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Licking Catch
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 in any combination of Fire Pokémon and Basic Fire Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.

name: Reshiram ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Blazing Burst
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken. Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Oshawott
flavorText: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

name: Dewott

attacks.name: Energized Shell
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.

name: Samurott

abilities.name: Torrential Whirlpool
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Energized Slash
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.

name: Basculin

attacks.name: Bared Fangs
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has no damage counters on it before this attack does damage, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they'll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.

name: Vanillish

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon's habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.

name: Vanillite

attacks.name: Ice Edge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.

name: Blitzle
flavorText: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their flashing manes to communicate with one another.

name: Swanna

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

name: Ducklett

attacks.name: Firefighting
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.

name: Vanilluxe

attacks.name: Double Freeze
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads. If either of them is heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.

name: Zebstrika

attacks.name: Electrobullet
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: Keldeo ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Gale Thrust
attacks.text: If this Pokémon moved from your Bench to the Active Spot this turn, this attack does 90 more damage.

attacks.name: Sonic Edge
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Joltik

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.

name: Galvantula

attacks.name: Discharge
attacks.text: Discard all Lightning Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

flavorText: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.

name: Stunfisk

attacks.name: Muddy Bolt
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Fighting Energy attached, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

name: Woobat
flavorText: Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.

name: Swoobat

attacks.name: Happy Return
attacks.text: Put 1 of your Benched Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

flavorText: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.

name: Sigilyph

attacks.name: Reflect
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 40 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Telekinesis
attacks.text: This attack does 70 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.

name: Yamask

attacks.name: Focused Wish
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.

name: Cofagrigus

attacks.name: Extended Damagriiigus
attacks.text: Move all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Perplex
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.

name: Gothita
flavorText: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.

name: Gothorita

attacks.name: Fortunate Eye
attacks.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck and put them back in any order.

flavorText: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.

name: Gothitelle

abilities.name: Distorted Future
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may have your opponent shuffle their hand into their deck and draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Synchro Shot
attacks.text: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.

name: Frillish

attacks.name: Oceanic Gloom
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

flavorText: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.

name: Jellicent ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Oceanic Curse
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't play any Item cards or Pokémon Tool cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Power Press
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra Energy attached (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Roggenrola

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks if that damage is 40 or less.

flavorText: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.

name: Boldore

attacks.name: Smack Down
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.

name: Gigalith

attacks.name: Vengeful Cannon
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Fighting Pokémon.

flavorText: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.

name: Sawk

attacks.name: Rising Chop
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon isn't a Pokémon ex, this attack does nothing. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.

name: Archen

attacks.name: Acrobatics
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.

name: Archeops

abilities.name: Ancient Wing
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may devolve 1 of your opponent's evolved Pokémon by putting the highest Stage Evolution card on it into your opponent's hand.

flavorText: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.

name: Liepard

attacks.name: Knock Off
attacks.text: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

flavorText: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.

name: Patrat

attacks.name: Procurement
attacks.text: Search your deck for an Item card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.

name: Scraggy
flavorText: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.

name: Terrakion

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.text: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 80 more damage.

flavorText: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.

name: Zorua

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.text: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

name: Vullaby
flavorText: Its wings are too tiny to allow it to fly. As the time approaches for it to evolve, it discards the bones it was wearing.

name: Mandibuzz

abilities.name: Look for Prey
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Your opponent reveals their hand, and you put a Basic Pokémon with 70 HP or less that you find there onto your opponent's Bench.

flavorText: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

name: Hydreigon ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Greedy Eater
abilities.text: If your opponent's Basic Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack used by this Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Dark Bite
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Watchog

attacks.name: Focus Energy
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Hyper Fang attack's base damage is 240.

attacks.name: Hyper Fang
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

name: Trubbish
flavorText: Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places.

name: Garbodor

attacks.name: Gunk Shot
attacks.text: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.

name: Druddigon

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.

name: Ferroseed
flavorText: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.

name: Durant

attacks.name: Bite Together
attacks.text: If Durant is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.

name: Scrafty

attacks.name: Ruffians Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin for each Darkness Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

flavorText: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.

name: Mienfoo
flavorText: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.

name: Mienshao

attacks.name: Smash Uppercut
attacks.text: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.

name: Ferrothorn

attacks.name: Power Whip
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon for each Energy attached to this Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.

name: Purrloin

attacks.name: Invite Evil
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 Darkness Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can't help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.

name: Zoroark

attacks.name: Mind Jack
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Foul Play
attacks.text: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

flavorText: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

name: Deino

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.

name: Zweilous

attacks.name: Double Hit
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage for each heads.

flavorText: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.

name: Herdier

attacks.name: Roar
attacks.text: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavorText: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

name: Lillipup

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.

name: Bouffalant ex
rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

abilities.name: Bouffer
abilities.text: This Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Gold Breaker
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 100 more damage.

name: Tornadus

attacks.name: Wrapped in Wind
attacks.text: Attach a Basic Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hurricane
attacks.text: Move a Basic Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

name: Energy Retrieval
rules: Put up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Harlequin
rules: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, flip a coin. If heads, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards. If tails, you draw 3 cards, and your opponent draws 5 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Emboar

abilities.name: Inferno Fandango
abilities.text: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Fire Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

name: Simisear
flavorText: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.

name: Lampent

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.

name: Samurott

abilities.name: Torrential Whirlpool
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Energized Slash
attacks.text: This attack does 50 more damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.

name: Ducklett

attacks.name: Firefighting
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.

name: Vanilluxe

attacks.name: Double Freeze
attacks.text: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 90 damage for each heads. If either of them is heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.

name: Blitzle
flavorText: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their flashing manes to communicate with one another.

name: Zebstrika

attacks.name: Electrobullet
attacks.text: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: Sewaddle
flavorText: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.

name: Leavanny

attacks.name: Healing Wrapping
attacks.text: Heal 100 damage from each of your Basic Pokémon.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.

name: Cottonee

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.text: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.

name: Deerling
flavorText: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.

name: Pansear

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.text: Draw a card.

flavorText: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.

name: Oshawott
flavorText: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

name: Boldore

attacks.name: Smack Down
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 50 more damage.

flavorText: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.

name: Sawk

attacks.name: Rising Chop
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon isn't a Pokémon ex, this attack does nothing. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

flavorText: The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.

name: Brave Bangle
rules: If the Pokémon this card is attached to doesn't have a Rule Box, the attacks it uses do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance). (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)
You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. You may attach only 1 Pokémon Tool to each Pokémon, and it stays attached.
Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached.

name: Cheren
rules: Draw 3 cards.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Ignition Energy
rules: If this card is attached to 1 of your Pokémon, discard it at the end of your turn.  As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Colorless Energy.  If this card is attached to an Evolution Pokémon, it provides ColorlessColorlessColorless Energy instead.

name: Virizion

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.text: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Emerald Blade
attacks.text: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

name: Swanna

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.text: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

name: Joltik

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.

name: Gigalith

attacks.name: Vengeful Cannon
attacks.text: This attack does 20 damage for each damage counter on all of your Benched Fighting Pokémon.

flavorText: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.

name: Hilda
rules: Search your deck for an Evolution Pokémon and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

name: Tool Scrapper
rules: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tools attached to Pokémon (yours or your opponent's) and discard them.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

name: Shelmet

abilities.name: Stimulated Evolution
abilities.text: If you have Karrablast in play, this Pokémon can evolve during your first turn or the turn you play it.

flavorText: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.

name: Heatmor

attacks.name: Licking Catch
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 3 in any combination of Fire Pokémon and Basic Fire Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.

name: Basculin

attacks.name: Bared Fangs
attacks.text: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has no damage counters on it before this attack does damage, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they'll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.

name: Yamask

attacks.name: Focused Wish
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.

name: Gothorita

attacks.name: Fortunate Eye
attacks.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's deck and put them back in any order.

flavorText: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.

name: Antique Plume Fossil
rules: Play this card as if it were a 60-HP Basic Colorless Pokémon. This card can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat.  At any time during your turn, you may discard this card from play.
You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

abilities.name: Plume Protection
abilities.text: As long as this Pokémon is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Swadloon

abilities.name: Healing Leaves
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from your Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

name: Accelgor

attacks.name: Acid Spray
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

name: Pignite
flavorText: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

name: Chandelure

attacks.name: Incendiary Pillar
attacks.text: If you have 10 or more Basic Fire Energy cards in your discard pile, this attack does 100 more damage.

attacks.name: Burn It All Up
attacks.text: Discard all Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.

name: Dewott

attacks.name: Energized Shell
attacks.text: This attack does 30 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.

name: Frillish

attacks.name: Oceanic Gloom
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

flavorText: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.

name: Litwick

attacks.name: Brighten and Burn
attacks.text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may discard that card.

flavorText: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

name: Vanillite

attacks.name: Ice Edge
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.

name: Roggenrola

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks if that damage is 40 or less.

flavorText: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.

name: Stoutland

attacks.name: Odor Sleuth
attacks.text: Flip 3 coins. Put a number of cards up to the number of heads from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Special Fang
attacks.text: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, this attack does 100 more damage.

flavorText: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.

name: Sawsbuck

attacks.name: Push Down
attacks.text: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck's horns.

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon's habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.
